violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of bio-film. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC emptied ice and started sanitizing process. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. PIC ordered test strips during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer have an accumulation food residue, and other debris. Slicer was cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

The floor in the basement area has an accumulation of old droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Equipment to be moved from wall and cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024
The hand-washing sink in the bar area was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the bar area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024
The bar area hand sink is lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

Pink vodka sauce, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Sauce was prepared yesterday. Soup was observed at 47 degrees. Soup was disposed of. Cooling guide provided to PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Recently prepped chicken was placed hot in the refrigerator in covered containers greater than four inches deep. Chicken was moved to the walk-in in shallow pans. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

A speed rack with food and prep sink was observed directly next to a hand sink with no splash guard. Splash guard to be added to hand sink. Speed rack to be placed elsewhere until splash guard is added. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Proper storing procedures reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Per ice cleaning log, ice machine was cleaned 7 weeks ago. Establishment to increase frequency of cleaning of ice machine to prevent build up. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

Employees' phone was observed stored on the slicer. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024
